# Basic weapon tester

This a very simple and cheap weapon tester for epee.



## Weapon compatibility

| Epee | Foil | Sabre |
| ---- | ---- | ----- |
| ✅    | ❌    | ❌     |

## 

## Required tools

- 3D printer

- Soldering iron

- Screwdriver (Phillips)
